data.body: LANDED: Gerrit change 320 (headroom-bypass fix, bug sue-skimp-tear) MERGED to main as c83819a11. LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1, submittable, 0 unresolved comments. Worktree reset to origin/main. Plan-review + completion-verifier gates now functional. RESUMING epic #16 (sure-foyer-aroma) 14 stories, starting f93a.
